description: You are an automation engineer configuring an AS/RS pallet crane simulation in Webots. The structural joint hierarchy is set up, but the linear axes require configuration of mechanical travel limits and motor maximum velocities to prevent collisions. Configure X_AXIS_JOINT with JointParameters minStop 0.0, maxStop 25.0, and LinearMotor maxVelocity 3.0. Configure Y_AXIS_JOINT with JointParameters minStop 0.2, maxStop 8.5, and LinearMotor maxVelocity 1.5. Configure Z_AXIS_JOINT with JointParameters minStop -1.2, maxStop 1.2, and LinearMotor maxVelocity 0.5. Save the modified world to /home/ga/Desktop/asrs_configured.wbt.
